message:
refactor(html_export): remove tool-badge-name span and update tests

Remove the inline tool name text from tool badge buttons — the name
is now only shown inside the popover header, reducing badge visual
footprint to just icon + status indicator. This creates a more
compact tool call strip in exported sessions.

Update tests:
- Rename test_tool_output_truncation_utf8_safe to
  test_tool_output_with_unicode_renders_safely and update assertions
  to verify full content preservation in popovers (no truncation)
- Rename test_tool_badge_truncates_long_input to
  test_tool_badge_preserves_full_input_in_popover and verify inline
  popovers contain full scrollable content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
